title: HTML5 Features Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the modern capabilities of HTML5.

questions.question: Which HTML5 element is used for drawing graphics and animations using JavaScript?
What is the primary advantage of HTML5 local storage over cookies?
options: LocalStorage is only used for temporary data.
LocalStorage can store much larger amounts of data without affecting performance.
Cookies are encrypted, while LocalStorage is not.
There is no difference between them.

questions.question: The Geolocation API allows a web application to do what?
options: Determine the user's physical geographic location.

questions.question: Which of these is a new HTML5 input type that provides a calendar widget in many browsers?
HTML5 was the first version to natively support which of the following tags without a plugin?
